scope: structural — empty-data sub-interface contents per spec; gates on widget chrome / positions / borders

items.name: CharacterInterface composition (left panel)
items.spec: Per docs/design/screen-lobby-character.md: render the username overlay at (20,71) bank 134 advance 8; four stat overlays at (17, 130/143/156/169) bank 133 advance 7 (empty content OK); five Toggle widgets (bank 181 idx 0..4) at y=90, x=20+i*42 for the five agencies. Selected-state highlight is non-gated. Region: bbox (10,64,217,120) of the LOBBY dump.

items.name: GameSelectInterface composition (right panel)
items.spec: Per docs/design/screen-lobby-gameselect.md: render bank 7 idx 8 right-border chrome; 'Active Games' label at (405,70) bank 134 advance 8; SelectBox bbox (407,89,214,265) lineheight=14 (empty); Scrollbar (bank 7 idx 9, scrollposition=0); five selected-game info overlays at (405, 358/370/382/394/406) bank 133 advance 6 (empty); Join Game B156x21 at (436,430); Create Game B156x21 at (242,68). Region: outside bbox but the GameSelectInterface bbox is (403,87,222,267).

items.name: ChatInterface composition (bottom-left panel)
items.spec: Per docs/design/screen-lobby-chat.md: render bank 7 idx 11 chat border; bank 7 idx 14 chat input border; channel name overlay at (15,200) bank 134 advance 8 (empty content OK); chat TextBox at (19,220,242,207) bottom-to-top (empty); presence TextBox at (267,220,110,207) (empty); chat TextInput at (18,437,360,14) (empty); chat Scrollbar bank 7 idx 12 + thumb idx 13. Region: bbox (15,216,368,234).

items.name: Visual equivalence (full LOBBY with sub-interfaces)
items.spec: Final gate. Candidate PPM is visually equivalent to /tmp/real_lobby_dump.ppm with all three sub-interface regions structurally rendered (chrome borders, widget outlines, scrollbar thumbs, action buttons positioned correctly). Empty-data interiors (chat messages, game list rows, runtime stat numbers, non-localusername text) are non-gated. Diff budget: ~3-5% acceptable for the structural pass; deeper visual fidelity requires populated server data and is out of scope.
